entries.reachability: Lodash is present through Hardhat/coverage/typechain build tooling. The vulnerable _.template imports option is not invoked by repository deployment, verification, or deterministic compilation scripts; no maintained fixed lodash 4.x release exists as of this remediation.
entries.rationale: Finding-specific temporary acceptance while upstream packages migrate away from lodash 4.17.21 or npm advisory metadata is corrected; all other high package roots were remediated through dependency overrides.
compensatingControls: No untrusted template strings are passed to lodash _.template by repository scripts.
Deterministic compile and tests run after dependency remediation.
This triage expires and is invalidated by dependency path/version changes.
